bosses.name: Restora the Lava God

bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat VERBATIM (boss-coloured 'Restora the Lava God:' prefix, read across chat_00003/19-21/39-40). A LAVA GOD boss. mechanics: DOCUMENTED: GENUINE ROTF (owner VoltiPlay). RESTORA THE LAVA GOD — a lava-arena boss that summons green minions + sprays scattered orange/red bullets, and on death delivers a gracious-loser DEFEAT sequence: 'ARGHH' -> 'You defeated me...' -> 'Good bye.' (repeated in chat). The run ends with VoltiPlay (Lvl 20 Paladin) dying (death screen, 'by Oryx the Mad God'). Only the boss's DEFEAT taunts captured (no attack-phase lines).

Drops not isolated.
